name: HyperBit SRLs - AS208437
notes:
IPv6 is fully supported across our infrastructure, and RPKI validation is enforced on all EBGP sessions.

We are open to bilateral peering with networks that share common traffic interests in the region.
For peering requests or coordination, contact noc@hyperbit.it 

Policy: Prefer settlement-free peering with stable, 24/7 operated networks with a clear presence in Italy or neighboring regions.

Location(s): MIL (Seeweb Caldera)
RPKI: Validated / Reject Invalid

IPv6: Native

NOC: 24/7 – noc@hyperbit.it

SOC / Abuse: soc@hyperbit.it, abuse@hyperbit.it
